LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DOUG KAPOVICH'S MOTION FOR ORDER TRANSFERRING VENUE TO SAN MATEO COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT (AND REQUEST FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES). COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. NO DEFENDANT HAS A RESIDENCE IN SAN FRANCISCO. ALTHOUGH THE BOY SCOUTS OF AMERICA MAY BE SUED IN THIS COUNTY AS A FOREIGN CORPORATION THAT DID NOT MAINTAIN A PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS, THAT DOES NOT MAKE IT A RESIDENT. A CHANGE OF VENUE TO SAN MATEO COUNTY IS WARRANTED UNDER CARRUTH V SUPERIOR COURT (1978) 80 CAL APP 3D 215, 220. THE REQUEST FOR FEES IS DENIED. IT IS PREMATURE TO CONSIDER THE CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
